creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
miwi        2006-12-30 21:49:51 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    www                  Makefile 
  Added files:
    www/trac-addcomment  Makefile distinfo pkg-descr pkg-plist 
  Log:
  The AddCommentMacro allows for easy addition of commetns to a page, in a
  standard format. The comment body supports normal TracWiki WikiFormatting.
  
  WWW: http://trac-hacks.org/wiki/AddCommentMacro
  
  PR:             ports/107268
  Submitted by:   Gerrit Beine <gerrit.beine at gmx.de>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.1656    +1 -0      ports/www/Makefile
  1.1       +28 -0     ports/www/trac-addcomment/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +3 -0      ports/www/trac-addcomment/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +4 -0      ports/www/trac-addcomment/pkg-descr (new)
  1.1       +1 -0      ports/www/trac-addcomment/pkg-plist (new)
